---
name: Feature request (English)
about: Suggest a new detector, output, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to do, and what's missing today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the detector, option, or behavior you'd like. If it's a new
anti-pattern, include an example log or query that should be flagged.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, if any.

## Additional context

Links, references, or anything else relevant.
